_comment: Copy this file to job_search_preferences.json and fill in your own targets. This file drives the Job Scout agent so it searches for YOUR roles, not someone else's. It is git-ignored.

target_roles._comment: What kind of work you want. Titles + the themes that matter to you.

target_companies._comment: Companies you want the scout to check first. Leave empty to search broadly.
also_consider: e.g. mid-size companies in the same space

location._comment: Where you can work. Used as a hard filter by the scout.

filters._comment: Optional hard excludes so the scout never wastes your time.
